title: A Direct Threat To The Gulf Business Model
section_path: A Direct Threat To The Gulf Business Model
section_path_text: A Direct Threat To The Gulf Business Model
summary:
Main
By Yiannis Parganas
For most of the past decade, the Gulf states tried to live with Iran rather than settle the Iran problem. They hardened air defence, built diplomatic channels, and kept repeating the same basic for-mula. Contain the threat, avoid a regional war, and keep the eco-nomic transformation story moving.
